# pfun-health/pfun-cma-engine-c

_Optimized C extensions for PFun CMA model (mathematical engine)._

## Usage

##

    In [1]: pfun_cma_engine.run_cma_engine_c(np.linspace(0, 24, 48), 0, 2, 1)

## Development

##

    # Install development dependencies
    $ uv sync --dev
